review_text:
We recently stayed with our caravan at Ocean Beach Tourist Park for a few weeks and absolutely loved our time there.

The previous managers, Becky and Pete, were wonderful and made our stay such a pleasure, and the new managers, Jodie and Darren, are exceptionally friendly, kind, and accommodating. They really make everyone feel welcome.

The park itself is small, tidy, and has such a lovely atmosphere. Even though the park is smaller in size, the sites are quite spacious, always clean, and very well maintained. Once you get to know people, it truly feels like a little family community.

My husband and I have travelled all around Australia, and we can honestly say that Ocean Beach Tourist Park had the cleanest bins and laundry facilities we have seen anywhere in the country! The amenities are always sparkling clean, and the outdoor kitchen is immaculately cleaned every day — it honestly sparkles like it’s brand new.

The location is perfect for a holiday — directly across the road from beautiful Miami Beach. Our 3-year-old daughter absolutely adored the fairy garden and the little Jurassic Park dinosaur area. She spent hours playing there every day.

We would highly recommend this park to anyone wanting a relaxing and enjoyable stay on the Gold Coast. We can't wait to be back in August!

Dasha & Matt

We arrived there 05:20pm, 20 minutes after the office was closed. Our information was, that they have a late check in box and we could get our check in stuff there. As we opend the box, there was a phone and some random car keys inside. We called the emergency number from the campground and the phone in the late check in box ringed. There was an emergency buzzer, but this one also didn’t worked. You can see the emergency number everywhere, it‘s so sad that this didn‘t work out tonight. After one hour, a nice worker came and told us, that they forgot us. They apologized and let us in. After that, everything went well for us. We hope that this was a one time mistake and wish you all the best!

I've not been to many, but I already know that this is gonna be hard to beat. Location is just perfect with direct access to supervised Miami South Beach and direct connection to public transport just in front of the park. Lovely café on the beach side as well. Park is neat and tidy, there are no better or worse sites to park on bc the park is build very open. This creates a nice, neighborhood-like atmosphere, where everybody meets and greets. No noise issues, except you don't like the sound of waves crashing and birds singing. Last but not least I want to mention the park managers Darren and Jodie: Beyond friendly, helpful and kind surely two of the best individuals I met so far! Keep it up, I'll be back!

Great spot, good clean workable amenities.
Park well looked after, close to a patrolled beach ⛱️, caught a couple of fish 🐟 for breaky, Cafe 20mtrs from the back gate ☕️🍽 , short walk to Miami tavern 🍺, Coles bit further down or garage 100mtrs away for bits and pieces.
Only thing stopping 5 stars is no wifi 😒

small, nice park.  next to beach through gate at back of park. toilets clean and tidy.  Like many parks on coast it was pricey.  we paid approx $68 per night but only because we stayed 5 and paid for 4. I notice they have 2 night min. Based on price, would not stay again.
A great little van park. The only downside at the moment is the Gold Coast light rail construction going on out front.

Everything was amazing. We were on site OB -03. |Cannot fault park at all. |Amenities, location, cleanliness, staff, sites are all 100%|We will definitely recommend and return. |Also love the size of park.
Close to beach
A little gem. Small, well managed, quiet Park close to the beach and other facilities. Great coffee shop nearby. Looking forward to our next visit.

This would have to be one of the best caravan parks in Australia. Just metres from the beach right in front of the surf lifesaving club  a wonderful corner coffee shop. This caravan park allows you to park your car once and literally never move it again. Walking distance to grocery stores and some amazing beachfront walks in some of the best beachfront parklands in Australia. On site managers are hard-working, welcoming and always with a generous smile and kind attitude. This is seriously one of the most relaxing places to come and visit. Highly recommend.

The best little Boutique Tourist park we've ever stayed at. The managers, Bec and Pete go way above and beyond. The park is immaculate and kept looking lovely for all their guests. They have surfboards to hire, which is covenant as the beach is just across the road. There is a Surf Club and a coffee shop just outside the gate and a long stretch of footpath alongside the beach for an early morning walk.|The park is within walking distance to everything you need, and buses to get you further if need be.|Bec and Pete do an amazing job!!

sauberer kleiner Campingplatz mit allem was man braucht Laundry Campkitchen und super saubere Waschräume zuvorkommende und freundliche Angestellte tolle Lage zum Strand und zu Cafés und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten
This is a well run , very clean caravan park. You feel really welcome as well as safe in the park. We had a great stay and will return next year.
Amazing park with great facilities and lots of planned fun activities.  Best location across fron beach. Bec and Pete go above and beyond for their guests.  We will be back

The staff at reception were kind and friendly and accommodated to our needs.

The park is right on the beach front which was nice for when we did big walks or to go down to the beach.

However, we were parked on plot 29 and people would ride their bikes over our plot to get over the other side (a lot of times kids going round and round).

We found this slightly annoying as we realised they weren’t going over anyone else’s plots and it tended to be around the time we would sit outside to have some food of an evening.

There wasn’t any wifi on park grounds and we were paying $120 a night which we were not satisfied with.

Also, one night there was a power cut while we were making dinner. Nobody came to the site to investigate, we woke up at 3am and realised the power was back on, yet no explanation was given by the team as to why it went off in the first place, at an inconvenient time of evening too.

Overall, we would not stay here again as we
felt it wasn’t worth the value of money.

Our favourite park, quiet, just the sound of the ocean. That’s all you need.|Bec and Pete keep this place clean and tidy and always willing to help.|This is our 5 visit. Definitely back again next year.|David and Lisa Gilmour.

Ocean Beach Tourist Park
We stayed on sites 15 and 16, and they were easily the best in the whole park. The back gate leads straight to a great little coffee shop, and from there it’s only a short stroll to the beach. The water stays shallow for several metres, perfect for kids, and the patrolled area between the yellow flags made it feel even safer. The amount of shells along the shore was incredible.

Pam was wonderful to deal with when booking—so helpful and friendly—and the couple who checked us in were just as lovely. The amenities were clean and well maintained.

There’s no pool or kids’ activities, but honestly, you don’t need them with the beach right there. Our kids had a ball riding around on their scooters.

We’d happily stay here again and again. An awesome spot for a relaxed family getaway.

Great place to stay, we stayed at power site in our caravan and really enjoyed it, amenities are very clean and enjoyable and I would highly recommend this place to stay
Thank you Ocean beach tourist part

Great accommodation. Stayed for 2 nights at a powered site. Amenities are AWESOME! One of the best equipped and maintained sites I have been to.

Awesome location right across from Miami Beach. Quiet and relaxed vibe. Very much a family spot. Will be back when traveling through.
Had a wonderful short stay at this park.|The location and the amenities are superb.|My kids say it's their new favourite campsite and are already bugging us to go back!|Would Highly Recommend!

Great stop off on our Australia tour. Lovely and clean and quiet site.
Toilets etc very clean.
Well positioned and kept very clean. Many customers have returned over multiple years
Great location and great staff

Fantastic campground! Really clean and so close to the beach. Great kitchen as well - best equipped we’ve had on our 4 weeks of camping. Sound of the waves at night fabulous and the beach is great for surfing and playing with the waves. The owners were also absolutely lovely and accomodating!

We absolutely loved out stay here: close to the Beach, clean kitchen&toilets and fair prices :) thanks so much to the manager Pete, he knows about everything in the area and was always helpful and good vibes only. |Cheers Lea & Franz
Very good location, the facilities are always clean and the whole camping place is made to make you feel comfortable.

We had a wonderful experience. My partner and I were on our honeymoon road tripping in our van and rang to see if there was a last minute site for us and to our surprise there was!
When we got there, there was a little bit of confusion with the site being double booked however when we went to speak to the staff, they were incredibly helpful and apologetic (not that they needed to be!! We weren’t phased at all ). We managed to sort it all out and have some laughs and jokes whilst doing it. It was rectified quickly by an awesome team and we had a beautiful stay. A nice small park, right next to the beach. Would 100% go back again!
Thank you for a beautiful stay!

Great location, only across the road to the beach. Amenities were always clean. We used the Lime bikes to get around and it took us 25-30 mins to bike to Surfers Paradise. When we checked in, the receptionist also let us know that there were whales spotted in the sea - which was great to see! 😁
Sand has washed away from concrete slab, damaged our water pump on high edge. Paper information regarding the bus stop changes to transport would have been helpful.

Super Lage und sauber.
Mit dem Fahrrad ist man gemütlich in 15-20mim in Surfers Paradise. es hat überall Limes, welche man mieten kann.

Second time visiting Ocean Beach Tourist Park on our holiday to Australia (from the Netherlands).

Very nice, quiet campsite. Just cross the street and you’re on the beach. Amenities are always clean too!

Campeggio molto curato e ben tenuto posizione strategica
Servizi molto puliti
I gestori sono molto gentili e disponibili
Ottimo

We had a great time at Ocean Beach tourist park for 9 nights. Small park on the beach... just lovely! I was a bit worried before coming to the GC during school holidays that it would be crowded and hectic like other caravan parks but it truly felt tucked away and peaceful. Bec and Pete were amazing managers. Pancake brekky and sausage sizzle on grandfinal night were fantastic touches on what would have already been a great stay! Thank you!
Greg and Nicole
Honestly best park we have stayed at. Camp kitchen has all you need, Bathrooms are really clean and modern, Laundry facilities are great. It is quiet and a very short walk from the beach

Bec and Pete are your ideal park managers. We have just finished our second holiday at Ocean Beach and can’t wait to book again. It’s a great little park in a pretty busy part of the Gold Coast, but the best part is that you feel so far away from the business and traffic. You have a beautiful beach out front, cafes and shops in walking distance, huge clean sites and great amenities. It’s a safe park where our kids can scooter around and  play with other families. Definitely recommend!

A fabulous CP close to the beach, walking /cycling track. A smaller park with spotless amenities. Sites are big although a little tight in places. The artificial turf and concrete pads make it clean and tidy. The park is within close distance to restaurants, cafes and shopping. Bec & Pete do a wonderful job and are welcoming and friendly. Made our stay there very enjoyable. Looking forward to 2026.
Nice on the creek. Can be windy.

Absolute Managing staff were of great assistance throughout our visit, with the lead up upon booking to finally catching our breath and getting to share this Absolutely Amazing View.
Accessibility for the disabled community via ramps to cabin may need to be considered for revising.
If you're fortunate enough, migration season will bring an Oceanfront View to seeing a Mother Whale and Calf or even a pod of playful dolphins....... Even those chilled start up to a kinda day eary ocean fog. Magical 🪄All in all:
What's Not To 💛
WHAT A VIEW!!!!
AS SHOWN IN ATTACHED PHOTOGRAPHS. Located within walking distance from your accomodation is Hairdresser, Corner Convenience Shop/Takeaways, Pharmacy and not forgetting Bargara Lakes Tavern *Bus stops located along Woongarra Scenic Road entrance (short walk to Tavern) Public Transport available (Bus Service  Mon-Sat only) Other transport options enquire at booking with Administration Team. 😊

With Thanks, Appreciation and Looking forward to returning to this Lil Piece of Paradise.

Wendy & Sal's (Assistance Dog 🐕‍🦺) with help from Daughter Luella 🌻💛👍

Amazing place, position, service only sadness is no pets allowed, wish there was an area where limited sites (for pets were allowed) even if they have strict conditions, they are part of the family and only reason I can make this my holiday destination

This is a great little park nestled in a perfect location, amenities are clean and modern. Great little camp kitchen.  Short walk out the back gate onto the beach or enjoy a coffee at the cafe next door.  Close enough to shops, restaurants and activities.  Would definitely add you your list.

Next to the beach, what more do you need.
It's been a while since we have been here. It's still great place to stay, local to many clubs and pubs, walkways and the sea, of course.

Bec and Pete do an amazing job running Ocean Beach Tourist Park…they are to be highly commended for their quality service, well maintained facilities and super friendly vibe. They are always happy to help you out with any changes or questions (which is surprisingly rare nowadays!) They totally deserved winning the top spot in the 2025 ReviewPro People’s Choice Caravan Park of the Year Award and officially being named the #1 caravan park in the country!

Top location right on Miami beachfront…surrounded by lush bushland and sheltered by the headland, the park is surprisingly quiet and peaceful even though it is just off the Gold Coast Highway. Close to several different shopping and dining options….Burleigh Heads, Miami Marketta, Palm Beach, Pacific Fair. The best part is waking up to the sound of the ocean, walking out the front gate, grabbing a coffee and then doing the beachfront walk along Miami Beach. Perfect 🤩 10/10 🏄🏼‍♀️👙🩳🌳🌊
Picture perfect place to stay, Cabins are lovely, with the beach as your view from your balcony.
After a long day on the road, we luckily found the last available site.  However, $69 a night is a lot to pay for a lukewarm shower.
Great smaller park, good size caravan sites, a bit tight to get though,  good clean amenities

We stayed here after a week in Broadwater for Broadbeach blues festival 2025. Great location if you want to relax.. it's a smaller quieter tourist park for the older traveller, which we loved. We'd definitely stay again and would recommend for friends and family to stay. Easy walking between Miami and Burleigh, close to North Burleigh sufe club for a cold beer and a great meal.

We’ve been coming to Ocean Beach Tourist Park for years, mostly camping in our Van but we have stayed in the Cabins as well. Staff are wonderful, very helpful & nothing is too
much trouble.

We stayed on a powered site for four nights which was covered in astro turf. It was awesome. I wish more parks used this. Toilets where clean and modern. Sites are very generous but the small road between them.makes it tight to get into the site or out etc. . We will definitely be back

Entspannter Campingplatz direkt am Strand.
Wir haben 69 AUD gezahlt, und direkt vor Ort spontan gebucht!

Pros: right in front of great beach, nice staff, cafe on the corner, clean amenities
Cons: no indoor / covered communal area, very small camp kitchen only big enough for one family, tiny sites and narrow roadways (a glorified carpark)

5 Stars – Perfect Powered Site Stay!
We stayed at a powered site and couldn’t be happier. The park is incredibly clean and well-maintained. Pete and Beck are absolute legends – the perfect managers! Friendly, helpful, and really make you feel at home.
The beach access is right across the street, sunrise is the best! We’ll definitely be back!
Clean ammenities and very friendly staff. We definitly recommend!

This caravan park was absolutely beautiful.
Location- it's backs straight onto a lovely patrolled beach, great for walking and swimming. It is a short uber ride or hire bike ride to the city. Walking distance to coles/Aldi and other convinience stores, as well as cafes and restaurants.

Service - the lovely people who run the park are beautiful, so friendly and helpful. There was organised live music and food truck. Other activities for the kids through out the weekend.
The amenities where clean and tidy, showers where lovely, hot and good water pressure.
The park was clean, the slabs and turf made a great tidy camp site. Power on the site worked well as did the running water. All night were really quiet, and no noise past 10:00(latest).

Sehr gute Lage... Leider kein Platz für Palmen etc.
Preis etwas hoch... Großartige reception, seeeehr bemüht und hilfreich!!!
Guter Platz zum Stehen mit dem Wohnmobil. Saubere Toiletten und Duschen und direkt am Beach. Nachts sehr ruhig!

From arrival to departing. Bec an Peter ensure you are happy. Facilities are lovely an clean. Very close to beach, public transport, clubs an shops. We also stayed in a cabin an wow - the only thing you need to bring is food drinks an a smile. Very relaxing tourist park.

Amazing location
Loved my stay there all staff are wonderful

We had a great experience in this camp site. We had been travelling in a camper for over a week and this was our last stop. And we were blown away with the site, definitely the best one we have been in by far. Lovely clean amenities perfect location. And most of, all such helpful lovely staff. Especially Pete who was so quick to help us when we had an issue with our camper. He didn’t even hesitate to help and he was our hero. Couldn’t recommend this campsite enough to anyone:) thank you guys 🫶🏻
Very nice van park on the beach front almost visiting rellies

Wonderful small caravan park across from the beach.  Amenities are very good and cleaned well.  Above all else, the Managers and staff are a delight to meet and deal with.  Do yourself a favour and give it a try....you'll be happy you did.

Our yearly holiday with our family and friends is so special here at ocean beach tourist park.
Our kids can safely ride around, easy walk to the beach, clean accessible amenities and wonderful staff. We love that there are no play grounds or games room it’s just good old fashioned camping.
We love that each year we can rebook our sites and stay with our group. This is our 4th year and we will keep coming back.
Nice campsite next to the beach.

The caravan park is located just two steps from the beach, the spots are quite big and people at reception are very kind. The kitchen is nice and clean, the toilets as well. Every time they organise an activity they send a reminder by sms. In particular, we appreciated the text message mentioning that the forecast predicted hail. Thanks!

This is the best Caravan Park on the Gold Coast. The site is immaculately clean, the staff are amazing and the atmosphere for kids is exemplary. Our stays here are the best. The management staff (Bec and Pete) go way above and beyond to make your stay enjoyable and provide so many amazing experiences/activities for the kids. They even have a free pancake breakfast morning each week (where else do you find such wonderful people on the Gold Coast) Highly recommend this site.

Congested park. No play area or pool for kids. Next to beach. Kitchen has BBQ, stove, microwave and fridge but no cutlery, crockery or pans for cooking. Reasonably clean amenities. Great for campervans and motorhomes. Not ideal for camping.
Great spot right on the beach
Great location for a relaxing weekend, clean amenities and very friendly staff.

This is a lovely,small, extremely well run park . The staff ,reception , cleaning
and ground staff are all so  lovely and the park is really well cared for. Love the herb and fairy garden . There is alot of love in this park and we love it in return. Have been before ,here again and we  will return .

What an awesome place stayed here for 3 weeks staff were very friendly amenities  and camp kitchen  very  clean. 5 outta 5 Amanda in reception  was extremely exceptional  recommend staying at this park.
This is a five star place, Bec is lovely, place is clean and tidy and fabulous location. Will definitely be back.

We stayed here in our previous motorhome around 6 years ago and it was so great that we have returned to stay for three nights in our new motorhome.  The only downfall was of course the noise during the night from the making of the new tram line and roadworks.  The upside is that the park is in a fantastic location.  We didn’t have a tow car with us this time but it was only a short walk to the supermarket & eateries and the beach is right at the back of the park.
Other holidaymakers were super friendly and we shared many chats.
A very well-maintained park with friendly and staff. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Everything at this park is great except for it being a Telstra black hole and no internet availability.

Last minute booking here and our experience from the time we booked was beautiful. Every staff member we encountered were super friendly and went out of their way to make us and our boys feel welcomed. The amenities are absolutely spotless. Park is small but it has everything you need including a patrolled beach just out the back! Would recommend to all.

Would have to be the cleanest park on the coast . . The girls in the office were so nice and really helped us out when we needed to change our bookings  .. it’s a busy park because it’s a great spot !

This park is just fantastic, from the location, amenities, and more importantly the staff , the staff are committed and work tirelessly to ensure the park visitors have a positive memorable stay, we have stayed in both our caravan and cabins at the park , coming from Victoria to regularly catch up with family in Burleigh, we wouldn't stay anywhere else , well done Bec , Pete and Amanda and ground staff , thank you

Stayed 3 nights in an on-site cabin and although the location is great, not sure we’ll be back.

Pros: - Amazing location, beach right across the road, surf club on the corner, close to shops
- Ladies at reception were lovely
- Affordable compared to some other stays
- Comfortable beds and great shower

Cons: - Cleanliness wasn’t the best, mould on curtains, in sink and shower. Very dusty, thick layer on fans and visible on walls.
- Weren’t able to lock the cabin door throughout stay, reception did try and fix the problem but were unsuccessful
- No phone service inside cabin
- Lost power and weren’t able to contact reception to fix the problem due to office hours
- Carpark directly outside cabin had trucks and cars coming and going at all hours of the night
- Entire cabin needs a refresh, very old, run down, worn furniture

We had a powered site for 3 nights and the service we received from Amanda by special mention was amazing . Not just with us but other guests to . Wonderful with the kids and so accommodating to any request we had . Will be coming back for sure !

Our family has had the most wonderful experience at Ocean Beach Caravan Park. The managers have created such a fun and friendly environment. We've had pancake breakys, movie nights, arts and craft mornings, it's truly been amazing for our whole family. Such a great location and always clean and tidy. We love it!
Absolutely amazing park from the amenities to the ground and office staff. Quiet safe and friendly environment. Thank you.

I had a terrible experience at this caravan park. The man and lady (Amanda) spoke to me with the most disrespect I have ever experienced. Everyone had told me to go to Broadwater, and I should’ve listened. The staff made me feel uncomfortable and unwelcome. I will definitely never be going back and will make sure to spread the word because it was atrocious.

I rarely write reviews (this is the second in 10 years) but these guys deserve a big thumbs up. The caravan park is extremely clean with really lovely attention to detail in the presentation. Bec and Pete were the best managers/hosts I’ve ever seen - not only very friendly and helpful (I was a first time caravan-er) but they were fantastic with the kids. It was school holidays and they made up for not having a pool/games room etc with doing daily activities with the kids, lending them scooters/bikes etc. My kids made lots of new friends and by the end my 5 & 8 year old were begging to come back for Christmas holidays. Highly recommend - only down side is the roadworks adjacent to the park.

Last min booking to get the kids away.
Site was great. Facilities super clean. Right on the beach. The people who run this place make it, some mornings they cook pancakes for the kids, they have a movie night for the kids and are feeding them popcorn and marshmallows, rock painting, and a koala hunt for chocolate. Great hosts !

Some of the best customer service we've come across. We had to change our booking quite a few times and Bec was super accomodating. Never felt like we were putting her out.

Awesome location! Right on the beach, close to Burleigh, about 6 playgrounds within walking distance, as well as a shopping complex.

The park has a great vibe. Everyone was super friendly. Fairy garden and kids corner kept the kids entertained.
Love this park.

Honestly don’t know why you’d stay anywhere else. The park is on the beach, coffee at the gate, right next to the headland, extremely affordable for a family and the customer service is unreal. Our kids had a hoot and we found it to be super relaxing and enjoyable. THANKS HEAPS!!

What a wonderful park to stay in . We were on a powered site . Great location across from the beach , walking to cafes , surf clubs and shops . First time staying here to catch up with friends , we will be back as it is so friendly and the managers Pete and Bec are so welcoming and provided social nights and games to mingle with other guests ! Amenities are sparkling clean .
Love the location which is very close to the patrolled beach, facilities was perfect, clean, and comfortable. I will be definitely be staying here again.

Amazing location - easily the best site we stayed in across Australia. Definitely worth the money.

Service was so good, not enough nice words to say about Becky and Pete

Great staff
Extremely helpful and friendly
Excellent position right on the beach

My wife and myself stayed here for 2 weeks. In our van. Fantastic park. One of the best we’ve stayed in. Management couldn’t be more helpful. Very clean amenities. Very good sites . Would thoroughly recommend this caravan park.
This caravan park should be the bench mark for all parks. Staff, amenities and location, all first class.

Incredible park, the managers are fantastic too. Right on the ocean 🏝
Seriously great 👍

Wir waren an diesem Ort mit unserem Wohnmobil und waren überrascht wie schön es ist. Tagsüber gab es Bauarbeiten auf den Straßen aber nachts war es sehr ruhig. Und wenn man mit Kindern diesen Ort besucht hat man das Glück, dass jeden Tag eine andere Veranstaltung für die kleinen stattfindet. Wir kommen gern wieder und empfehlen diesen Ort.

Stayed here for a few years now in both tent and cabins. Amazing spot, so close to the beach. Amenities always spotless. Last but not least the hospitality of the manager’s Bec and Pete is second to none. Sausage sizzles, arts and crafts for the kids, pancake breakfast, live music and more. You will 10/10 enjoy your stay here. We come back every year because of this!
We love our home away from home, Pete and Becky are just lovely host. 🥰

It’s my favourite place from the first impression in the reception with Super friendly staff and very helpful, then the campground and the Villa and the location is Amazing then as you get out the Sand beach is so beautiful. Will definitely come back.
Beautifully maintained  park with  super friendly  staff,  loved the centre row of  artificial turfed sites.
Super Campingplatz am Strand in einer sehr guten Gegen von Gold Coast. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und die Infrastruktur sauber. Alles bestens! Wir können den Platz empfehlen!
Sehr saubere Toiletten und Wäschezimmer. Der Campingplatz wirkt immer aufgeräumt. Die Besitzer sind herzlich und hilfsbereit. Was will man mehr?

Schon bei der Ankunft haben wir uns willkommen gefühlt. Die Mitarbeitenden sind sehr höflich, gut gelaunt und hilfsbereit. Unser Stellplatz war sehr gross und die ganze Anlage war ausgesprochen sauber (inkl sanitäre Anlagen). Der wunderschöne Strand ist nur einen Steinwurf entfernt. Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten sind zu Fuss erreichbar. Wir haben die Ruhe sehr genossen - der Ocean Beach Touristpark ist wirklich eine Oase!
Great spot for a summer holiday.  Across from the beach and so central.
Wonderful place to stay in my caravan, easy access to a patrolled beach and great facilities nearby

An absolute must for a fantastic Caravan park experience. Very big sites. Extremely clean and well maintained amenities and within walking distance of everything you need, including Dan Murphy’s, Aldi, Coles and only 50 meters from the beach. It’s a small park with 62 sites but one of the best on the Gold Coast. We will definitely be back next year and highly recommend you give it a try. The park management are extremely friendly and helpful.

We were pleasantly surprised by this little park.

Super friendly, accommodating staff and very clean amenities.

The park is right next to the beach and cycleway/running path. From the park Broadbeach is a flat 4km cycle into the action.

No activities or pool here for kids but when you're just basing yourself at the park to do other GC activities, it has all you need.

We particularly liked the large artificial turf sites.

Thanks for having us!

Wow!  This place was a really nice surprise.  Stayed for 2 nights and could have done more. We usually don't like staying in urban areas but once you get settled in here it's so easy to forget where you are.  The nearby bluffs and beach really help with that feeling.  Amenities were great. Sites were nice and big and we didn't feel crowded in together.  Highly recommend the 9 minute walk to the Quade coffee shop rather than the one next door.  Excellent walking in the area.  The views from the nearby bluffs are absolutely stunning. Cost was $62AUD per night for powered site, no pad
Best kept park we stayed at and a perfect location! First time stay but certainly not the last!

Bec was amazing, we had problems with our car and couldn’t make the reservation and we were able to switch it to a day later which was amazing! Perfect location!! Lovely campground! Can only recommend! ♥️

Great park, opposite beach, walking distance to Aldi, Coles, Dan Murphy etc. The managers are an absolute delight to deal with,  they keep the park clean and tidy. Our caravan site was spacious, with fake grass covering it. Highly recommend this Park.
Really cool place, great location

A great location and helpful staff members. There aren't a lot of child facilities such as games room jumping pillow etc, but seeing as the beach is so close you can understand why. Facilities were clean and access was good

Llegamos tarde (fuera del horario) y nos atendieron amablemente y sin problemas, el sitio es fantastico y muy bien cuidado, despues de estar en muchos campings en nuestro roadtrip en australia puedo decir que este es el mejor, los baños impecables, las instalaciones muy limpias y cuidadisimas. Un 10. Recomendadisimo.
We stayed for 8 nights. It's a budget friendly motel, close to the beach. It has a nice cafe on-site, and a lovely little pool. It was quiet, not many guests this time.
Great friendly staff, Unit great has everything you need. Close to the beach. Pool great but the best is the modern laundry

De units zijn top en bevatten alles wat je nodig hebt. Kunnen wel nog iets beter schoongemaakt worden. Het zwembad is heerlijk en de locatie dichtbij het strand ook. Jammer dat je savonds niet de mogelijkheid hebt om eten te bestellen in het café. Producten uit het winkeltje zijn duur maar altijd handig als je echt iets nodig hebt. The rangers asked us which campsite we had booked and they informed us that we had only booked for 3 people. We were apologetic and expected to have a reasonable conversation, only to be interrogated on the Rangers body cam as if we’d committed some horrible crime and given a $150 fine. fab park, right on a great beach, good restaurant and lovely staff, bogs amnd showers super clean....till I went in

We had a 3 night booking here a few weeks ago. The park is in a great location, the sites were great, the facilities were all clean, and staff were all friendly. There was a Cassowary (and chicks) roaming around when we were there, which was initially exciting. It ended up kicking the door of our (brand new) caravan a few times while we were in it, and we decided to leave after 1 night. Be cautious / prepared to cover up if you have a dark reflective vehicle or caravan. The door of our van is the only reflective part, and it got kicked…hard. We ended up putting a sheet over the door afterwards. We came in with no idea about any of this, and obviously would have sorted it if we had known. The staff did eye check our set up from the desk at check in and confirmed it was fine. We realistically needed more advice on this risk upfront, a more thorough check, or at least a rundown to check it all out ourselves…

Park is nice but seriously the sites are ridiculously small and they keep piling in vans. if you have a full size van, it’s an absolute joke trying to get in and out of your site. And if it hasn’t already happened a kid will get run over as you have no chance of spotting them coming out between cars before it’s too late.
Best spot ever. Right on a great beach. Good for families. Refurbished cabins.
Had awesome time at the tasman. They even let me have a spot for my boat. We hired a cabin and was very nice and clean and comfortable beds.  Will come back as soon as we can.

Lovely spot on Mission Beach.  Quiet, clean facilities, pool area   Nearest shops Woolworths  about 7.1 km.   Main town 10 km Had a visiting  food stall the night I arrived Tuesday and has some other events other nights  Happy hour beer and wine Wednesday

BEWARE  !!!!!     Rude, obnoxious Owner/Manager who desperately needs training in business and customer service skills.  What a terrible experience!  Please book anywhere but here.
We had made prior arrangements with staff for an early check-in. We arrived early (after 10am) as arranged. We were greeted by a male receptionIst. He gave us amenity keys and a map with our circled sites (group booking).  We proceeded to our allocated sites only to find them both occupied. One site was being vacated (no problem) the other site showed no sign of being vacated anytime soon.  The guest on our site was also not happy advising that he had arrived late the night before and was given a site big enough for a small tent..problem being he had a large caravan..,hence he moved to our allocated site (staff incompetence) Together this guest and ourselves went back to see the Receptionist to organise other sites…the Receptionist appeared to be out of his depth as to how to rectify this) Eventually sites were organised.
If  we  were too early we were happy to wait .Problem solved. We went off to enjoy our holiday.
Later that same morning we attended a local hairdresser who enquired where we were staying and how we liked it. A comment was made that it was ok apart from a “bad experience” setting up(nothing else elaborated on).
Later that afternoon the Manager/Owner  barged into our site without introducing himself and began a barage of abuse, threats and insults at the audacity of speaking the truth of a bad experience setting up sites. He accused us or arriving too early and would NOT let us explain that this had been pre-arranged.  He also accused us of saying things that were NEVER said. He was shaking with rage abusing us and would not let us speak. He left  threatening us as he drove away in a huff!
We have taken the time to provide a detailed review to warn others of this Manager and his incompetent staff.  We were also advised strictly “no fires” allowed in the park but the tenants (yearly regulars) next to us had a fire …different rules for some.
We were so intimidated and concerned that we were on the verge of requesting Police interaction.  It was so stressful that we all vacated the next morning and requested a refund of our 6 unspent nights.
We have travelled Australia extensively for over 17yrs and this is the very first time we have ever had an issue. After reading other’s reviews this Owner/Manager has appalling business skills and absolutely no people skills. He cannot handle complaints, criticism or accept the incompetence of his staff. He is condescending and treats you as inferior.

Our 4th visit to this park and definitely our last . The staff were fantastic and gladly moved our previously booked stay to this month due to serious medical reasons. We received our revised account on June showing the small amount to pay on our arrival .

This caravan park is managed by the G’Day group. It is quite expensive per night even after discount. However, the location is unbeatable situated across from Mission Beach. We stayed for two nights on 5 July 2025 in our 7M Sprinter Motorhome. The sites are fairly tight to squeeze into.
The shops are only a 5mins walk away. Lovely village that will be even nicer once all the road and pathway construction is completed. It will be like a mini Noosa QLD.
The amenities were adequate. However, the camp kitchen is very basic. There are no bins anywhere. You need to dispose of your rubbish by walking a fair way to dump it into a heavy skip bin in the middle of the large park. Management need to review this. As many complained it is too heavy to lift the lid when you are a senior older female.
We would stay again. But will look at other places along the coastline that others there have told us about.

In the heart of Misson Beach close to everything.
Refurbished pool.
Worth a visit

We stayed here for two days as part of our June/July getaway, and unfortunately, it hasn’t been the best start to our trip. It was clear that the notes in my booking weren’t read—I mentioned I had a side-fold camper, yet I was allocated a site with such limited turning space that it was impossible to get my small camper trailer onto the slab. They do have a little bobcat to manoeuvre your rig but its hitch wasn’t compatible with my pin based trailer connection.

The layout feels more like a modern housing estate—hello, neighbours!—with cars spilling out onto the grass and edging into the roadway. The sites are far too cramped.

When I asked reception about changing sites, I was told it wasn’t as simple as moving to a vacant one. Apparently, some spots are reserved for their ‘regular’ seasonal travellers—which made me feel like my money was worth less than theirs. What a joke considering it’s over $110 for two nights.

In the end, I was moved to a grassed, powered site, which was equally small. We decided to cut our stay short and move on after just one night.

I would also recommend the caravan park provides bins in the men’s bathroom and laundry.

The location of the caravan park is great, but the sites are too small and overpriced. I’d recommend staying elsewhere.
A great caravan park, unfortunately Mission Beach is undergoing MAJOR roadworks.
Great spot to stay at mission beach, the family loved it
Wonderful park, opposite beach, great pool. Very friendly staff and a Cafe on-site. Clean and well maintained amenities blocks, great camp kitchen. Would highly recommend 👌

A Perfect Stay at South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park!

Our stay at South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park was absolutely fantastic! From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the incredibly friendly and helpful staff, who truly went above and beyond to make us feel at home.

The park itself is one of the cleanest and best-maintained we’ve ever visited. The lush green grass and beautifully kept gardens create a relaxing and inviting atmosphere. The facilities are spotless, and the attention to detail in maintaining the park is outstanding.

The pool was crystal clear and well-kept, providing the perfect spot to cool off. The pool slide and playground were a huge hit with the kids, keeping them entertained for hours.

A real highlight of our stay was the incredible cassowaries and their chicks wandering through the park – a truly unforgettable experience and a testament to the park’s stunning natural surroundings.

If you’re looking for a clean, well-maintained, family-friendly holiday park with exceptional service and a beautiful setting, South Mission Beach Tasman Holiday Park is the place to go.

The park manager is awesome & it's a great place to stay.

Recently stayed here for Christmas and the staff were so friendly and welcoming. Beautiful place to stay with family or as a couple. Bathrooms and camp site were very clean also.
Highly recommend this caravan park.
Beautiful park with clean facilities and a lovely pool. We were pleasantly surprised:)

Pros and cons.|Pros. Park gardens good, nice swimming pool.|Cons, the older cabins where we stayed were dirty and shabby, the new  owner very unprofessional and inhospitable.  Only interested in collecting your money, cabins were expensive. The worst treatment we have ever had in a caravan park and we’ve stayed in hundreds.

The manager friendly. The park very tired. Our cabin very old and shabby. We had a pet friendly cabin. Really should be knocked down. Paint peeling off the roof , bathroom door off its runners. Very over priced but thats  very common with pet friendly cabins. I don’t mind paying extra if the experience worth it. On our 6 week road trip from Adelaide to Cairns, this was our worst value for money.
Great staff and in a awesome location only about 100m from the heart of mission beach with plenty of cafes and restaurants

We had an absolutely incredible stay at Mission Beach Hideaway Holiday Village. We stayed in one of the deluxe cabins and it exceeded all expectations — it’s clearly been recently renovated, with a fresh, modern feel. The bed was honestly one of the most comfortable we’ve ever slept in, and even the trundle bed in the living area was surprisingly luxurious.

The cabin was fully equipped with everything we needed — a great little kitchen with all the essentials, plus we made use of the BBQ area for lunch one day (highly recommend tbacon and egg sandwiches!). The amenities across the park were spotless, beautifully maintained, and very calming to use.

A huge shoutout to the staff: we originally booked back in April through a third-party site on a non-refundable rate. Due to a family tragedy, we had to cancel, and despite the circumstances, the team reached out and offered to reschedule our booking. They kindly moved it to June, and even when we needed to adjust our dates again due to school exams, they accommodated us without any fuss.

Another bonus: the park is pet-friendly on request. Our fluffy husky, Talini, was welcomed with open arms and has absolutely loved it here.

The whole property is peaceful, clean, and beautifully maintained — lush green grass, quiet surroundings, and a truly relaxing vibe. Our cabin was a dream: cosy, stylish, and incredibly comfortable. Couldn’t recommend this place more — we will absolutely be back.
Huge park good facilities.
Friendly service, best location, great value

Very disappointed. Stayed for two nights was told the cabin was newly renovated. No the bathroom needs work the kitchen and bathroom towels full of ants. The shower does not work couldn’t get hot water. Tv had no signal. Someone did look at tv and fixed the antenna but still no picture. Yes we went to reception several times during business hours but no one was there. I also emailed which I still haven’t heard back from. $618 for two nights should have stayed at a resort .

This is the third stay here at hideaway and there will be more to come. Fabulous place to stay and relax. It’s nice to see that they maintain the park by removing trees that are too big or cause hazard to the guests.
Very friendly and considerate owners/ managers.
Well done

If you would love to stay across the road from the caravan park with beach front views. Be woken to the sound of lawn mowers, chain saws, blowers and stump grinders and road construction, then this is the place for you. We got to sit on the fringe of the rainforest and watch them cut down palmtree after palmtree for our entire stay. The best thing about this park was the shower heads, pool and LEAVING. I'm sure the new owners are lovely, but alas our stay was not!

Great location. Excellent friendly service.   Very helpful in sorting out a mistake I had made with my booking and helping get us into a cabin better suited to 3 adults. Walking distance to beach and village shops.
Great park. Clean amenities. Close to town.

Très bel endroit pour y rester quelques jours, près de la plage, des cafés et restaurants !
Les installations sont vraiment bien entretenus plusieurs fois par jour, la piscine est au top !
Nous y sommes resté une seule nuit sur un site avec électricité mais très content ! De plus le personnel est gentil et toujours souriant !

We have been staying here for the past several years with friends over the Easter weekend and always enjoy our stay. The rooms are clean and tidy. The grounds are kept in good condition. However, this time has left a sour taste, when on returning home to find a deduction from my back account without informing me of any discrepancies or adjustments. With zero communication on this matter except for an email that makes no sense as well as not taking my calls and hanging up on me. Very disappointed.

Great holiday park, beautiful grounds, lovely pool, right opposite the beach and close to the restaurants and cafes. Most importantly, the managers were fantastic - so friendly and helpful. Honestly couldn’t have asked for more. Highly recommend 10/10.
Never ever go there
Average accommodation, but it's all you need. All amenities, MW, Toaster, fridge linen, swimming pool..
Modern facilities, very clean, quiet, close to the very nice beach. One of my favourite parks I’ve stayed
We spent 1 night at mission beach and really enjoyed the campsite. Clean, tidy and very comfortable. We'd definitely stay again
Fabulous spot...definately worth a 2-3 night stay.
100% put this place on the bucket list, best service best atmosphere, best location
We really enjoyed our stay at Mission Beach in our camper.  The location and surrounding area was awesome.  The amenities were nice and we felt safe staying there.  We would camp again here.
If you want to leave your bissy live behind, BIG4 Tasman caravan park is the place for you.
Nice park with reasonable amenities, just a bit too cramped to get a higher rating
We’ll be back.  One of the best parks we have stayed and we have stayed at a lot.  In top 5
5 star caravan park, very clean and tidy. Friendly staff very well maintained caravan park.

We stayed at the park last week we had a caravan not a cabin, we intended to stay 4 days but stayed a week as it's such a great place to stay,   the hosts were incredibly friendly, very neat park opposite the beautiful beach, great pool & you can hire a boat to go fishing or just around the islands.  I can't speak highly enough of this place & will definitely return
Had a relaxing 3 night stay in our campervan. Reasonably priced and amenities and staff excellent- nice site and trees between each. Pool and on-site cafe excellent- highly recommended

Staff were inviting and friendly, the park and amenities are well kept, impeccably clean and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The cafe onsite is excellent value and the food was delicious. We will definitely be back. Thankyou!

We stayed at beach villa 18 for 3 nights, the location is awesome overlooking beach, road access and the tiny house was clean and tidy. The pool is awesome but very cold. The water feature and crocodile are a cool touch. The restaurant is convenient and food is huge. The park was absolutely packed when we were there however it was still quiet and not roudy at night.. Cons- outside bbq very hard to use it’s got no temp control and is too hot, burning everything, 3 rinai split systems in our cabin, lounge room one didn’t blow out cool air. Kids bedroom one the fan is worn out and very noisy. Wifi doesn’t work in this cabin it’s too far away but there’s phone service anyway. Cutlery was broken and frypan completely un-usable so we had to go buy one. Overall this is a great place to stay as a family

Ein sehr gut aufgebauter Holiday Park. Hier wird auf Sauberkeit geachtet und Mitarbeiter bemühen sich, den Urlaub der Gäste so angenehm wie möglich zu gestalten. Einer der Besten, die ich in Australien besucht habe.
Lose to the beach and walk
We staan op de camping met een camperbus. Toiletten en douches zijn netjes en schoon. De locatie is mooi, alleen werkt het weer niet mee.

Fantastic 2 night stay in 2brdm beach front cabin. Plenty of room for our family of 4. Queen bed in one room and bunk beds in other. 1 large bathroom and well equipped kitchen. Unfortunately no washing machine but we were aware of this and there is a laundry onsite. Bbq on front verandah very handy. Roof fan on verandah a nice touch. Location is amazing, 40 steps to the beach from our cabin! Could watch the beautiful sunrises in the morning. Had dinner at the onsite Cafe one night, was nice.
This is a rare place you can swim in the beach in FNQ! Highly recommended, especially the beach front cabins.
It is well placed for the beach, great views, catch up with friends

Excellent Park Easily Accessible carvan sites.|Managers Elvira and Partner were eccellent and so helpfull.|The Park staff were all excellent.|The Beach was fabulous for swimming and very long walks.|There were plenty of things to do and some of the restaurants were great as well the spicy Thai a standout
Great place to relax and enjoy sunrise and sunset, our first trip in our caravan had stay before in a cabin put stay in our was so much more. Thank you we will back over and over again.

Awesome spot ! Right in front of the beach and near the amazing Kennedy track.
The park is beautiful, I stayed in an ensuite cabin which had all I needed ! I did not want to leave this place :-)
The staff is very friendly and they also have a nice cafe with yummy food. I will definitely come back !
Beautiful spot, great waterslide. Good facilities in the camp kitchen, and reasonable priced.
Unreal spot...

Enjoyed a wonderful two night stay recently with my young family.  We were very impressed with the location, facilities and beautiful surroundings.  Would love to have stayed longer (can't wait to return).  Best holiday park we have stayed in so far (not just in QLD but all of Australia). Comfortable 2 bedroom cabin, would love to book the beach front (accessible cabin) next time, as the more room the better with young kids.  Thank you for having us, we couldn't speak more highly about this accommodation 😊👌
Great rooms  friendly staff, great location.  What more could you ask for.
Very quiet. Great location and sites, but a bit wet at the moment.

Haven't stayed there as yet, though I can say that the location is great.
Food is great also, including staff.
When doing work at sth Mbch we call in there for lunch.
Great atmosphere guys.

Super gepflegter und sauberer Campingplatz. Waren für eine Nacht dort und konnten uns den Stellplatz selbst aussuchen. Das Personal war super freundlich. Tolle Lage direkt am Strand. Hatten sogar Glück und haben einen Kasuar sehen können.
Lovely place and staff
Beautiful beach and great camp parc with a great lowkey vibe!
Schöner Campingplatz. Sehr nettes Personal. Konnten uns unseren Stellplatz selbst aussuchen. Strand direkt gegenüber. Toller Imbiss mit leckerer Pizza und Pommes direkt am Campingplatz.

Best location in mission beach, there pet friendly cabins are a game changer for us, we used to camp here during the winter months but now the cabins are open to pets we’ll be here all year long. ||Highly recommend!||There new pool and games area was a big hit with the kids.

Just wanted to give Mission Beach Hideaway a shout out! The service was amazing! The owners allowed us to host a little party on the grounds and allowed our guests to use their pool. Nothing was a hassle for them.  Was a lovely undercover area with tables and chairs and a lovely space for a celebration.ovation is perfect with short walk to the shops and beach. Would stay again.

Lovely caravan park across the road from Mission Beach. The cabin was clean, spacious and perfect for two. Bed was comfortable and bathroom was clean. Good sized patio for the summer nights. Thank you for a great place to stay!
Great place to stay with kids and Fur Baby's  right on the beach

We absolutely loved our stay at Mission Beach. Our cabin was lovely and so close to the most amazing beach (and dog friendly)! The staff at the holiday park were so friendly and helpful. The pool was beautiful. We will be back to stay again!

We stayed for a week.  The staff were very friendly and helpful.  Low occupancy so we had room. When full we would have challenges.  The management ate spending $$$ , new pool and driveway and reception.
Room was clean and sufficient for our needs. Pool was clean. Loved the curlews! 😊
A few metres from the beach, great sites, plenty of room to accommodate any type of vehicle. Amenities were probably the cleanest and best kept we've been.
Great spot , lovely cabins, clean and tidy would definitely stay here again

Great place to stay
Walking distance to beach and shops

Stayed here many times usually with a group of friends. We love coming here cabins are always clean and so is the park . Nice spot for camping aswell, great location close to beach and pubs . Really quiet peaceful place

This is a great park for the family and located just across the road from the beach and the small township. The powered sites are very packed in, but there are still lovely palm trees between which gives it a tropical feel.
The kids have lots of fun in the pool, however it is a bit rundown.
Amenities are kept lovely and clean.
Nice clean park had a good stay
Our absolute favourite place to stay!
Unfortunately a very tightly packed campground. The regulars love it for understandable reasons but overseas tourist or 'lappers' might be disappointed.
The pool could use some mending but I loved it

Stopped here for one night when we couldn't face pitching our tent in the rain. Stayed in the basic 'shack' cabin and it was perfect for us. The bed was so comfy. We had WiFi, a TV & a comfy sofa too. We don't mind sharing bathrooms, and the facilities are so clean!
Great WiFi
Great location, minute from the beach, nice sites and slabs, good amenities.

Hermoso camping, amplio, sanitarios limpios, piscina, juegos infantiles, etc.
La atención impecable.
Great place, friendy and helpful staff and wonderful location right by the beach. Thanks a lot.

Receptionist/Manager Elvira was lovely.  So helpful.  Park was in a quiet pretty area, right next to the beach with clean and adequate facilities. The pool was also lovely with slide for the kids.  Couldn’t actually find the foodie scene, but perhaps didn’t look enough.

Visited during summer, small but shady caravan site close to the beach. Bathrooms have no ventilation and are hot, the males bathrooms are smelly. The pool water is hot. Neither the games room or TV room are air-conditioned making them hot and unusable. You also have to pay for all the games in the games room.
When I brought up my concerns with staff they let me know they are aware of the bathroom, pool and games/tv room heat issues but offered no compensation.
I wouldn't recommend visiting during summer.

Parked up here with our campervan for one night. Very friendly, helpful staff. Cyclone Jasper was close by so power went out just after dark, staff very helpful and reassuring guests through this and in providing advice on travelling onwards in lieu of the potential cyclone. Power restored after a few hours! Great amenities, plenty of showers/toilets for size of park kept in great condition.

Lovely little place right on the beach with a great little pool and waterslides. My only call out is that the park is very pokey, and hard to navigate with a van, and with quite small sites. We were here in the off season, and it was hard enough then, I'd hesitate to visit in the on season with a big van. Beautiful gardens, decent amenities and wonderful location.
Buen lugar para quedarse, zonas comunes amplias y limpias. La playa muy bonita, pero solo puedes bañarte en la zona acotada para evitar las medusas.
Camping bien aménagé au bord de la plage
Lovely park opposite beach, great pool ,very clean and well maintained with a great cafe at entrance of park with good food also licenced
We camped and loved it. The pool is great

We loved our stay here, especially the staff were so helpful and friendly (shout out to Elvira ). The room was clean, roomy and had all the amenities we needed. We didn't like the location as it was too far from the town of mission beach but that is a personal choice. Just to beware there is no public transport here but you can take taxis.

We stayed for 5 nights and it was just amazing! after coming all the way from Melbourne it was a great final stop before heading to Cairns!
Staff is great and very helpful and they take so much care of the park, so beautiful! my kids loved the pool and playground! Plenty other kids to play.

Great for families!

We'll definitly come back, if we have the chance!
We arrived after hours and called a number that was on the door. Within no time we had someone to talk to and got a campsite. Beautiful.
Worst caravan park for getting in and out 😳😳so stressful when busy and no room to move !! Need to free up more open space to allow easier access . Staff were wonderful and location is superb ,

We had a cabin for two nights. It was so clean and the bed and the linen was so comfortable., the lady at Reception could not be more helpful and accommodating, Highly recommend to stay here, I wouldn’t book anywhere else in Mission Beach.

Great location a few meters from the restaurants and the beach.
Other than that, the place is not worth it.
The BBQ are out of gas? They don't fix it, therefore no stove or oven to use in the camping. No WiFi.
Lack of site numbering, everybody goes mad looking for their site.
A lot of mud in the sites. The trash bins are all in one spot, convenient for the camping workers, not so convenient for customers.
In general, not bad for a night, but better options around.

Beware we had to cancel due to our father in law getting cancer gave them over a months notice and they didn't refund...
I waited 3 weeks kept calling noone returned my call.

Every other caravan park refunded us due to our situation.. I Will Not Stay here!!!!

Lovely cabins. The bed is very comfortable, the shower is good, and everything is spotlessly clean. Good amenities and the grounds are lovely. Neatly trimmed grass everywhere, the caravan sites have concrete pads for their awnings. Decent room per site. As caravan park cabins go, it's one of the best we've stayed at...

Clean campground and clean facilities. The location is nothing to write home about right next to the main road. However, the beach on the other side of the road was really beautiful even in bad weather and the staff were friendly.
Immaculate grounds. Great position across the road from the beach and close to amenities.

From making the booking to checking out, the team at the Village were super friendly. Big shout out to Mel.
The sites were clean, well maintained, spacious and close to the amenities, beach and Mission Beach township.
Dog friendly as well, so it made for a fantastic family getaway for Easter.

Me and my girlfriend stayed for one night, lovely cabin with small kitchen including tea and coffee making facilities, flat screen TV, fridge freezer, sofa and table and chairs, all clean facilities! Our cabin was a 2 minute walk to the beach and a further 5 minute walk down the beach theres a netted area safe for swimming. Staff were friendly and very accommodating, would definitely recommend staying here!
Nice holiday village with good kitchen and location. Amenities were big and very clean! Visited in February and it was calm.

Two night stay at a powered site. Clean amenities. As was the park. just across the road from the beach, which was told was safe for the dogs to run on.  Beautiful beach and when the tide went out even bigger.  Great walks along the beach and broad walk.  Although not much to do along the street, only one pub and the dogs had to sit in the street.

We’ve stayed here 3 times now. Twice in the cabins and once in the camper. Grounds are tidy and public restrooms always clean. The cabins are a little dated but clean and tidy and fully functional. Location is great, short stroll to the beach, pubs, cafes. We’ll be back.

This place is an oasis. It’s beautiful, the amenities are pristine and the staff are so wonderful.  The beach is just across the road but the pool is amazing and it’s so close to everything. Would never stay anywhere else! Powered site was perfect!
10/10

I would like to say the staff were lovely and welcoming... always with a smile and a laugh....I stayed in a tent...and there was lots of shade that is important....and saw the local cassowary, goanna and wallabies....it was very peaceful and enjoyable... definitely will go back

Very easy check in experience and the spa villa was good value for a two bedroom. It is a little outdated however and the bedrooms both have doors to the bathroom, which, unless you are super close with the person/s in the other room, it makes it a bit awkward.
Freundliche Mitarbeiter und ein wirklich guter Campingplatz! Die Badezimmer waren zu jeder Zeit sauber! Auch die Lage ist top!
Stopped for Lunch. Fresh local caught mackeral and home style chips. Beach setting and views of Dunk Island...pretty dam good!

Unpowered site
Personnel très sympa
Douches et wc un peu vieux mais en bon fonctionnement
Arrived late in the evening after check in was closed, keys and instructions were left in an envelope at the reception for us, golden star from me!

I stayed with my dog in our tent.
Beach directly across the road, with kids playground, amenities, basketball court, seating areas, dog beach offleash approx 3 km up the road.
Has cooking facilities with a big fridge for guests to store, food and drinks in.
2 amenities blocks plus laundry rooms, pool, tennis court, daily cleaning of public areas used, on top of any maintained required.
Quiet place, will definitely be staying again.
Staff were courteous and welcoming, kiosk has drinks, ice blocks and some grocery needs
Great location for a break. Friendly staff and close to the beach.

The  hottest with the mostest!
Alvira is awesome, she made us  very welcome, golf buggy tour to select site.
The sites are tight for a big van. But otherwise terrific. Water disappeared quickly after rain.
Toilets recently renovated and spotless.
Our favourite park
A good CP. new amenities about to open. New pool, looks good. No screaming children here at this time, how good is that👍

Stayed 1 night in a caravan , sites are very small , their was mud everywhere, I understand they have had a lot of rain , but their was large wheel marks on every site , no lights around the park at night, needs a lot of maintenance, cleaning around the sites, for $69 powered site a night , very over priced ,

This park shouldn't be more than three stars. Back part of the park is muddy without proper drainage amenities are outdated. The only good thing about this place is close to the beach. If this caravan park would be anywhere inland it would be rated 3- 3.5 stars and is very overpriced at $67 night for muddy place where you need gumboots to get out of caravan.
Great spot, great location. Right on the beach.

We booked 4 months in advance for a powered van site. They put us in an unpowered site that was inches deep in water after some rain. It flooded because they have done no drainage works and the site is in a depression. All our neighbours sites also flooded for the same reasons There are heaps better places to stay in Mission, I'd give this one a big miss.
Yeah it needs an update, which is coming.  Swampy if wet and it the tropics its almost always wet.  Still haven't missed a year in the last 10.

Just a great way to stay
Couldn't ask for anything more

Sites are narrow and small but you can cope with it. Park subject to flooding in heavy rain. Apart from that great Office and Ground Staff willing to bend over backwards to lend a hand. This is the pick of the Parks in Mission Beach. Away from the hordes and traffic.

Völlig in die Jahre gekommen und überteuert. Sanitäranlagen alt und dreckig. Baustelle auf dem Campingplatz. Super teuer für das, was geboten wird. Aber gute Lage für einen Ausflug nach magnetic Island.

Wir haben Ende September/Anfang Oktober diesen Jahres 1 Nacht auf diesem Campground verbracht, welchen wir schon von unseren Reisen in den Jahren 2017 und 2019 her kannten. Die Anlage ist perfekt gelegen und bietet rundherum alles, was das Australien-Fan-Herz begehrt: Sonne, Sand und Meer. ;-) Die Powered Sites bieten genug Abstand zueinander. Die sanitären Anlagen sind in Ordnung. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir werden garantiert wieder einmal dorthin zurückkehren.
Great little holiday Park. Clean & staff very helpful. Close,to beach & shops.
Quiet, central to town and close to beach
A wonderful park, great location, people and facilities. Love the village atmosphere and really enjoy our stays here. We are well looked after

We enjoyed ever minute of our stay. Staff and management were just lovely  very helpful. Amenities best we seen on our trip, so clean and fresh. Gardens were just beautiful. Thank you for making our stay enjoyable.
Pauline and Georgina x
We love this caravan park but not as much as we love being at Mission Beach Qld
Hidaway Holiday Village is the best  kept secret on the East coast of Australia 🇦🇺.  The park is well maintained and has the cleanest toilet blocks I have ever used. 😀

I love mission beach. Little village with a few shops and restaurants a woolies supermarket not far drive. This park is in the perfect location right opposite the beach, don’t need your car park it up and just relax. You can walk to the beach to the shops and restaurants. Facilities here are so clean and well maintained. Good size camp kitchen if you need. Sites are a little squeezy and they really pack them in. If you have a really big rig I would probably re think this place although we did see one squeezed in as well as a boat! Weather was not on our side this visit so lots of mud everywhere. But love this park we will be back. Highly recommend.

Not great, inflexible owner lady who didn’t allow us to modify our booking upon arrival ensured a unpleasant start. Sites are super small with very little privacy, WiFi is terrible, non existent. And what is the deal with only one set of bins on the entire park?!

Only redeeming factor is the location and staff.

G'day parks should drop this park. In March, my partner booked powered site for 2 weeks mid July. & paid a deposit. After suffering a medical emergency we contacted the park 1 month beforehand to explain our situation and cancel the booking.The lady was extremely rude & denied us any refund stating it was a non refundable booking fee & not a deposit. We were not told this until we received the receipt. July is an extremely busy period in Nth Qld & there is no way they couldn't rebook our site. We know they did, and effectively just double dipped fees. We stayed a few times years ago with no problem, but definitely won't go back now.

Unfortunately we've had a bad experience with this caravan park.

We booked two powered caravan sites 4 months out from our stay and were really looking forward to it because it looks like such a beautiful location.

We had a big trip planned with accommodation on either side of this stay, however the park contacted us a few days out advising us that the dates were booked incorrectly.

These things happen of course, but the staff have been extremely rude, defensive and unaccommodating, which is extremely disappointing.

Not once have they simply said 'sorry'. We have now been left without accommodation (and 5 kids between us - not ideal!) and the park is refusing to give us our deposit back.
Very nice place to go. Across the road to beautiful beach. Close to shops and cafes. Reasonably priced.

What a weird experience. We travelled the all world, all continent and stayed in all kind of hotel, hostel and camping. Seeing from the outside this camping seems very nice and we booked a night without checking the internet reviews.
Not a single one is exaggerating, the lady owner is the rudest person we've met in this industry. Dropping the toilet keys when leaving we were yelled at, berated, belittled. Our crime ? Dropping the keys a little too late, because we haven't see the check out sign.
It is sad to see someone go ballistic for such a trivial matter.

Excellent location and facilities close to all shops & well maintained.
Mary thanks for staying back to book us in we appreciate it very much.
Love the serenity of mission Beach

Amenities were well looked after
Number of toilets and showers seem not sufficent for such a big camp ground
Very friendly personnel
Nice place, on the beach with clean facilities and easy access to shops.
Manager has every right to be proud of this park with perfect location. Adjoins beach, park and great array of speciality food with character.
Terry and staff are a pleasure to deal with. A great well maintained park.

One of the best beaches on the east coast of Australia, and metres from the beach at Mission Beach Camping and Caravan Park.
An established park with customer focused management under Terry, highly recommended.

Great stay! The staff were super accommodating, sites were spacious and flat, kitchen was fantastic for a break from our caravan setup, and the laundry was FREE! Dog friendly and a fantastic, convenient setup right on the beach as well. Highly recommend.
Paradise right in the heart of town. Definitely a favourite spot to chill out in.
Site 17 puts you straight onto the beach and it a short walk to town.
Great location on the beach and close to the hub for entertainment. Good facilities for the campervanners and caravanners.
Sehr schöner, kleiner und ruhiger Campingplatz direkt am Strand. Die duschen und Toiletten sind auch sehr sauber.
Nice campsite beach front. Toilet/shower were clean.
Amazing place, clean, friendly close to everything Staff are amazing and helpful nightly recommend
arrived late in the dark, found it no problem, prompt email instructions on how to access info on site location, then such a short walk to the village. amazing scenary to wake up to.
Camping piccolo, ma in posizione spettacolare! Servizi semplici ma efficienti e puliti.
Love staying at Mission Beach, the crew are always very friendly and engaging, always a can do and no problem attitude
Facilities are very clean. Close to the beach. Nice track to walk.
Beautiful location, right on the beach.  WiFi is terrible, lucky to get it to work, but you’re in such an amazing place. Facilities good. I would recommend.
Beautiful and handy location, easy access,  lots of shade, clean amenities and friendly staff. Recommend this caravan park.

An excellent site with great communication, helpful and friendly staff. After a delay with picking up our motorhome on our first day, we arrived last on-site and picked up an envelope which gave all instructions needed for us to settle on the site. The next morning we were helped with the amenities, filling our water etc. Location is also fantastic, right on the beautiful Mission Beach. Thank you for a great stay, would highly recommend!

Sehr gemütlicher Camping mit tollem Strand, an dem man aber wegen den Quallen nicht schwimmen kann  Vielen dank an Ethan für die Hilfe, unser Campervan ist inzwischen wieder dicht. Lg die Schweizerinnen
Really nice Caravan Park. Great location, friendly staff and good amenities.

Beautiful location nice and relaxing. Park has all the amenities and very clean facilities. Everything is close by walking distance beaches,  shops and the Tavern. Highly recommended staying there 😃😃😃😃😃

Great value for money, owner is very kind and helpful. There’s everything you need in the kitchens. Bathrooms are clean and laundry area is free! Quite a rarity to find free laundry service in a camp park, would definitely come back and recommend!
They also got a lovely selection of t-shirts and bags and other cute souvenirs!
Thanks so much!

Absolutely stunning spot, right on the beach 🌊😎
Lovely small park but with plenty of room.
Extra bonus was the markets on Sunday morning, in the park, right next to us - lovely atmosphere & great coffee 😎☀️🤩

Really a beautiful place. Best beach we have seen. The installation are well maintained and very clean. Free laundry. The owner is very caring and friendly. Would definitely recommend and go back. The little village has nice restaurants and bars. Animated.

Wow we had booked for a beachfront camp site and we were not disappointed! Stunning views of the ocean as we woke up. Plenty of facilities, camp kitchens, showers and toilets, free use of washing machine. Local tavern/bottle shop and cafes all within ha few minutes walk.  Very relaxing and peaceful.

Great location but sadly not impressed with their policy ethics!  Staff great.  Very little in the way of amenities.  Nice new toilet and shower block and free washing machine and drier.  No games room or sporting options.  Right on the beach.  Now for the negatives!   We booked in on a weekly rate of $280 which was honoured for 3 weeks then the last week it was suddenly jumped up to nearly $400 and there was only us and one other caravan in the park!  Then a tropical low developed with gusty winds predicated so management said we would have to get out because it was becoming into a cyclone.  We did the sensible thing and departed after 3 nights. We had checked with staff and was advised we would be refunded less a 5% charge and thought this was fair.  However when we went to get the refund they refused and said they never refund any unused nights!  Robbery.  Was rudely told to read confirmation send via email after after payment.  Apparently staff need to read this as well.  We were only departing due to the cyclone.   We were told we could use the nights later and we should consider ourselves lucky we were being offered this.  As an owner operator myself I find this attitude towards a guest appalling and frankly absolute greed.  Fellow travellers please be aware of "escape parks"policies... There is no flexibility and once they have your money  don't expect any flexibility even when there is a pending cyclone.  We are not happy travellers and will be very hesitant to ever book with this group again.

No where to tie down awnings etc.
